name: Patrika Gate
notes: Modern landmark with intricate designs, good for photos. Located near Jawahar Circle.

name: Govind Devji Temple
best_time: Morning aarti (4:30 AM - 5:30 AM) or evening aarti (7:30 PM - 8:30 PM)
notes: Krishna temple with royal heritage. Avoid peak hours if you want less crowd.

name: Amer Fort
best_time: Morning (8-11 AM) to avoid heat and crowds
notes: Elephant rides, light show in evening. Wear comfortable shoes.

name: City Palace
best_time: Morning (9-11 AM) or late afternoon (3-5 PM)
notes: Royal residence with museum, courtyards. Guided tours available.

name: Hawa Mahal
notes: Famous 'Palace of Winds'. Best viewed from outside, but you can go inside for a small fee.
